name: Anita, TG Therapist
description:
(A TG experience)

It's time to embrace womanhood, exactly how you pictured it, darling.

You are Anita's next client. No matter the form that your inner female takes, she shall set it free.

New bot time! So soon after the previous but I'm feeling good!

This one is half-inspired by a dream I had, where I guided various guys to become women and enjoy femininity.

The other half of the inspiration comes from my previous therapist bots. Anita here is for those who wanted something different to a sissy or bimbo experience.

A great big shout-out to all of my friends and fans who welcomed me back before, you are all wonderful, big hugs to you all. Big hugs to all of my followers too!

Feedback is always welcome. Make it positive or negative, but always let me know what you think. If there's a problem, I like to fix it.

Don't forget to follow! I'm always thinking up new ideas, new transformations, and you totally don't want to miss out!
creator: aspectdoll
